programs.subtitle: FA Cup Final: Chelsea v Manchester City
programs.description: A special behind the scenes look at some of the biggest matches in the world of football.

programs.title: Live: FA Trophy
programs.subtitle: Final: Southend United v Wealdstone
programs.description: Action from the 2026 Isuzu FA Trophy final at Wembley Stadium as National League sides Southend United and Wealdstone go head-to-head.

programs.title: MotoGP
programs.subtitle: Catalan Grand Prix: MotoGP Race
programs.description: Action from MotoGP.

programs.title: FIM Superbike World Championship Motorcycle Racing
programs.subtitle: Czech Round: Superbike Superpole Race
programs.description: Action from the FIM Superbike World Championship.

programs.title: FIM Superbike World Championship Motorcycle Racing
programs.subtitle: Czech Round: Superbike Race 2
programs.description: Action from the FIM Superbike World Championship.

programs.title: British Superbikes Motorcycle Racing
programs.subtitle: Round 2: Donington Park GP, Race 2
programs.description: Action from race two of the second round of the 2026 British Superbike Championship, taking place at Donington Park in Leicestershire.

programs.title: British Superbikes Motorcycle Racing
programs.subtitle: Round 2: Donington Park GP, Race 3
programs.description: Action from race three of the second round of the 2026 British Superbike Championship, taking place at Donington Park in Leicestershire.

programs.title: The Ultimate Fighting Championship
programs.subtitle: UFC Fight Night: Arnold Allen v Malquizael Costa
programs.description: Action from UFC Fight Night at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas, featuring the main event clash between featherweights England's Arnold Allen and Melquizael Costa.

programs.title: Australian Rules
programs.subtitle: Essendon v Fremantle
programs.description: Action from the Australian Football League as Essendon take on Fremantle at the MCG. Can the Dockers pick up a ninth win in a row?

programs.title: Australian Rules
programs.subtitle: St Kilda v Richmond
programs.description: Action from Round 10 as St Kilda, looking to build on their solid start, welcome a struggling Richmond side to Marvel Stadium.

programs.title: SailGP
programs.subtitle: Bermuda SGP
programs.description: Highlights from round five of the 2026 Rolex SailGP Championship as 13 elite teams battled it out for glory on the iconic turquoise waters of Bermuda.

programs.title: LIV Golf League
programs.subtitle: Virginia: Tournament Review
programs.description: Action from LIV Golf as some of the world's best golfers compete for glory.

programs.title: UEFA Europa League Football
programs.subtitle: League Phase: Real Betis v Nottingham Forest
programs.description: Nottingham Forest return to European football for the first time in 30 years as they travel to face Manuel Pellegrini's Real Betis at Estadio Benito Villamarin.

programs.title: UEFA Europa League Football
programs.subtitle: League Phase: Rangers v KRC Genk
programs.description: Russell Martin's Rangers begin their UEFA Europa League campaign as they welcome Belgian side Genk to Ibrox Stadium.

programs.title: UEFA Europa League Football
programs.subtitle: League Phase: Aston Villa v Bologna
programs.description: Aston Villa begin their hunt for the UEFA Europa League trophy as they welcome Vincenzo Italiano's Bologna to Villa Park. Unai Emery's side beat Bologna 2-0 in last year's UCL.

programs.title: UEFA Europa League Football
programs.subtitle: League Phase: Crvena Zvezda v Celtic
programs.description: Brendan Rodgers' Celtic kick off their UEFA Europa League campaign with a trip to take on Serbian champions Red Star at Rajko Mitic Stadium.

programs.title: UEFA Europa League Football
programs.subtitle: League Phase: Celtic v SC Braga
programs.description: Celtic seek their first win of the league phase as they host Portuguese side Braga at Celtic Park. The visitors are winless in their last five league games.

programs.title: UEFA Europa League Football
programs.subtitle: League Phase: Nottingham Forest v FC Midtjylland
programs.description: European football returns to the City Ground as Nottingham Forest face off against Danish side Midtjylland. Can Ange Postecoglou pick up his first win as Forest boss?

programs.title: UEFA Europa League Football
programs.subtitle: League Phase: Feyenoord v Aston Villa
programs.description: Unai Emery's Aston Villa look to make it three wins on the spin in all competitions as they travel to face Robin van Persie's Feyenoord in the UEFA Europa League.

programs.title: UEFA Europa League Football
programs.subtitle: League Phase: Sturm Graz v Rangers
programs.description: Rangers travel to face Austrian champions Sturm Graz at Merkur-Arena. Sturm Graz were 2–0 winners when these sides last met in Europe back in 2000.

programs.title: UEFA Europa League Football
programs.subtitle: League Phase: Go Ahead Eagles v Aston Villa
programs.description: Aston Villa look to make it three UEFA Europa League wins out of three as they travel to face Dutch side Go Ahead Eagles at De Adelaarshorst.
